rationale: Diff contains only execution evidence files (manifest.json, result.json). No CHANGELOG entry was added and cli/go.mod is not shown in the diff, so AC #2, #3, and #4 cannot be verified as satisfied.

findings.summary: AC #2 not met: no CHANGELOG.md entry present in the diff listing the six upstream beads/capabilities consumed.
AC #3 not met: no links to upstream beads in ~/Projects/agent/.ddx/ added.
AC #4 not met: no callout that AC #1 of parent ddx-fdd3ea36 is satisfied by go.mod + this CHANGELOG entry.
AC #5 violated: the only changed files are execution evidence artifacts, not a focused content commit.
